title: authentication login signup password reset
description: Test secure account creation, login, and password recovery flows including client-side validation and server-side actions for valid and invalid inputs.

title: onboarding wizard guided multi step setup
description: Verify the onboarding wizard multi-step process for seeding company details, default services, and templates, including validation and error handling.

title: dashboard main overview and quick actions
description: Validate the dashboard displays business metrics, recent activity, and supports quick actions like creating new quotes and global search functionality.

title: clients crud operations including validation
description: Test client management CRUD operations for both individual and corporate clients, including duplicate registration validation and deletion confirmation.

title: quotes creation editing and pdf generation
description: Verify full quote lifecycle including creation with itemized services, editing, payment options, warranty toggling, validation, and PDF export with error handling.

title: profile and settings management
description: Test user and company profile updates including address, registration number validation, and company logo upload with UI updates.

title: notifications and support widget functionality
description: Validate in-app notifications for quote events and support widget ticket submission with success and failure scenarios.
